summary: Frontend-only verification of ObaidTradez 'ALPHA VAULT' bug fix: NVDA mock $120 price replaced by live FMP quote and Live Data indicators on Header, Dashboard, Settings. All 7 requested checks passed.

verified_flows.result: PASS - redirected from /auth/login to / (dashboard), welcome toast visible
PASS - header price shows $208.62 (live FMP quote); mock $120.44 NOT present anywhere on page
PASS - header price $299.49 (live, in expected ~$290-310 range)
PASS - 8 cards with live prices: AAPL $299.50, MSFT $368.94, NVDA $208.67, AMZN $233.31, GOOGL $347.05, META $562.20, TSLA $406.02, AVGO $395.70
PASS - all four tabs render without visible errors; AI Thesis Final Assessment uses live price $208.59 and computes 'Analyst consensus PT implies -28.1% upside' from live price
PASS - green 'Live Data' chip visible on every page
PASS - green 'Live market data active' chip visible in Market Command Center header

PASS - 'Live Market Data Active — Prices, fundamentals and news are served live via Financial Modeling Prep + StockNewsAPI. Universe: 3,000 companies · refreshed 15h ago.' (no more 'Demo Mode Active — simulated' text)

minor_notes: Request mentioned tab name 'Thesis' but the actual tab label in the UI is 'AI Thesis'. Not a bug — both selectors confirmed working.
critical_code_review_comments: All requested live data indicators have proper data-testid attributes (data-status-chip, dashboard-data-status, settings-data-status) — good testability hygiene.

Research page successfully overrides mock prices with live quotes via useQuotes; the ~2-3s lag warning in the prompt was not actually observed (live quote was already populated within the 3-5s waits used).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix (NVDA mock $120 -> live $208 + Live Data indicators) is fully verified. Live quote via /api/prices/quotes loads quickly (<3s). /api/status returns {live:true, fmp:true, news:true, universeCount:3000}. Auth login (obaidtradez/Odm200429) works and redirects to /. Tab label in UI is 'AI Thesis' (not just 'Thesis'). Header chip is now persistent across all pages.
rca of the issue: Original bug: Research.jsx rendered hardcoded MOCK prices (NVDA $120.44) and 'Demo Mode' chips were keyed off per-user API key presence rather than real backend status. Fix verified: Research now overrides displayed prices with live FMP batch quotes (useQuotes hook); new /api/status endpoint + useLiveStatus hook drive a green 'Live Data' indicator on Header (data-status-chip), Dashboard (dashboard-data-status), and Settings (settings-data-status). Live NVDA price now correctly displays ~$208.62, matching backend FMP quote. Mock $120.44 no longer present on any verified page.
